scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:history: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic history
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.seeds.seed_sources
scripts.crawl:rss: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.crawler.rss
scripts.crawl:sitemap: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.crawler.sitemap
scripts.ingest:scheduled: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.jobs.scheduled_ingest
scripts.keywords:extract: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.keywords.extractor
scripts.llm:summarize: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.summaries.generator
scripts.search:reindex: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.indexer
scripts.suggest:reindex: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.suggestions
scripts.suggest:audit: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.suggestion_audit
scripts.search:alias-audit: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.query_alias_audit
scripts.search:ambiguous-audit: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.ambiguous_query_audit
scripts.search:evaluate: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.evaluation.evaluator
scripts.search:audit: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.evaluation.audit
scripts.search:keyword-probe: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.search.evaluation.keyword_probe
